findings.title: Server-side request forgery via unvalidated URL
findings.description: requests.get is invoked directly on user_supplied_url with no allowlist or scheme/host validation, so an attacker can coerce the server into requesting internal addresses such as 169.254.169.254 or localhost.
findings.suggestion: Validate user_supplied_url against an allowlist of permitted schemes and hosts, and reject internal or link-local addresses, before calling requests.get.
